2985816.title: SpongeBob
2985816.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2985882.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2985882.description: Yana eats a cookie to level up her smarts, but realizes it's her heart that makes her special. // Miguel learns a new trick, which gets him completely lost.

2985952.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
2985952.description: Felicity helps a mashup creature to realize his true potential. // To avoid a visit to Dr. Lotzashots, Felicity borrows Father Time's watch.

2986015.title: Dorg van Dango
2986015.description: Dorg is sick. The Magicals become microscopic to help fight the cold! // The new art teacher decides Dorg's a troublemaker, the gang will do anything to get back in the teacher's good books and win a prize at Art Day!

2986815.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2986815.description: The Penguins are faced with a global battle when their specialty food-making machine belches out a toxic cloud that threatens not just the zoo, not just the city, but the earth itself!

2986871.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2986871.description: King Julien is literally bounced out of his kingdom and onto the New York streets. // Skipper is forced to live his worst nightmare when he's doused with Inflatium and stress causes him to blow up like a balloon.

2986936.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2986936.description: The Turtles meet their first fanboy when a teenage wannabe hero decides to fight crime and dress up as "The Pulverizer."

2986977.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
2986977.description: While breaking into the hostile environment of TCRI headquarters, the Turtles discover the true intent of the Kraang and resolve to stop the alien invasion once and for all.

2987026.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2987026.description: Foop becomes Vicky's anti-fairy godparent. Vicky and Foop terrorize Timmy and the kids of Dimmsdale. Foop tells Vicky that the reason Timmy has thwarted her all these years is because he has fairy godparents.

2987838.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2987838.description: Timmy wishes Sparky would get a chance to be heroic. Dad thinks he can talk to animals.

2987878.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987878.description: After squabbling with his brothers, Alvin convinces Dave to give him his own room, but soon realizes living alone isn't what it's cracked up to be.

2987902.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2987902.description: When Alvin inadvertently destroys Theodore's bicycle, he enters the boys in a roundup of shopping carts where the first prize is a new bike.

2987993.title: SpongeBob
2987993.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2988792.title: SpongeBob
2988792.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2988832.title: SpongeBob
2988832.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2988884.title: SpongeBob
2988884.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2988951.title: SpongeBob
2988951.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

2989792.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989792.description: Anxious to give Dave a much-needed rest, Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap. Problem is, the house guests show up early while Dave is still home.

2989820.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989820.description: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant.

2989861.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
2989861.description: All the kids at school are obsessed with their virtual dogs on their smart phones. But when all the phones wind up missing, Alvin is blamed for the theft and has to follow the clues to find the real culprit and clear his name.

2989902.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2989902.description: Marlene is dying to go see a concert in the park. But, every time she leaves the zoo she becomes a feral monster! // Ma, an empty-nested mother possum, takes up residence in the Penguins Lair after they destroy her home.

2989988.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
2989988.description: When the penguins send Rico off to help King Julien an unlikely friendship develops between the two. // When King Julien steals Kowalski's new invention - a helmet that can make whatever you are thinking happen - he creates chaos at the zoo.

2990023.title: Hier is Pony
2990023.description: When pets are banned from the building, Annie and Pony have to convince the landlord to reconsider. // When the dog from next door, Pony's sworn enemy, comes to stay with them, Annie needs to find a way to make them get along.

2990840.title: SpongeBob
2990840.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2990921.title: SpongeBob
2990921.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

2991003.title: Fairly Odd Parents
2991003.description: After failing on a game show for 6th graders, Dad admits he dropped out of school in the 5th grade. The next thing Timmy knows, Dad's in his class! // Unable to resist the taste of Jorgen's grandmother's delicious brownies,Timmy steals the recipe.

3037559.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3037559.description: Tired of Mom's terrible dinners, Timmy wishes Mom were the best chef in the world.

3037593.title: Huize Herrie
3037593.description: After Lola gets sick and can't compete in her pageant, Lincoln coaches Lana to take her place. // Thinking it'll be easy, Lincoln and Clyde take on the task of babysitting the youngest Loud, Lily.

3037660.title: Huize Herrie
3037660.description: When all 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day, Lincoln has his hands full. // Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Bobby's little sister, Ronnie Anne.

3037957.title: De Casagrandes
3037957.description: When Bobby finds out Carl can't swim, he offers to show him the ways of the waves! // After begging Abuelo for some A/C, the cousins decide to earn some cash at the neighborhood fair.

3038046.title: De Casagrandes
3038046.description: The Changs go on vacation and leave Ronnie Anne and her cousins to watch after Cam, the chameleon snake. // Ronnie Anne and her skate buddies work together to show their coach that they have what it takes to make a team.

3038104.title: Breadwinners
3038104.description: Buckle up, duckies! The rocket van is about to get some sweet mods from ace-mechanic Ketta. // Mold strikes the bread mines, and the only ones who can strike back are TRUE Breadwinners.

3038156.title: Breadwinners
3038156.description: When the guys get stranded in the middle of the Great Pond, they're forced to level up into "Survivor Ducks." // SwaySway and Buhdeuce show off their "bread-side" manner by nursing their number one customer back to health.

3038458.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3038458.description: After April receives a warning from her imprisoned father, she and the Turtles embark on a mission to save him and stop the Kraang from detonating a mutagen bomb in the city.

3038509.title: Dorg van Dango
3038509.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3038554.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3038554.description: While trying to create two identical pieces of popcorn Ray and Henry accidentally brings to life the Popcorn Monster. // To help Ray win the Swellview Drone Dash against Dr. Minyak, Schwoz hatches a plan: shrink Kid Danger & have him pilot his own drone.

3038633.title: The Loud House
3038633.description: Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

3038932.title: The Loud House
3038932.description: It's the Sadie Hawkins dance at school and Lincoln's sisters have accidentally landed him four dates!

3038955.title: The Loud House
3038955.description: Lincoln and Clyde submit an Ace Savvy comic to a meet-the-creator contest, but are foiled by a surprising nemesis.

3039011.title: City Adventures
3039011.description: Fire Chief McCloud accidently buys a malfunctioning Twirly Hat for her nephew.

3039055.title: City Adventures
3039055.description: Police Chief Wheeler announces the formation of the 700 million dollar Sky Police.

3039081.title: City Adventures
3039081.description: A Master Criminal dabbles in real estate. Meanwhile Officer Duke DeTain and sanitation worker Shirley Keeper are on the hunt to discover the mystery identity of the Master Criminal.

3039103.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3039103.description: Cosmo is ousted from the house for being too annoying, but quickly finds relief in becoming Dimmsdale's newest & greatest super hero.

3039405.title: SpongeBob
3039405.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3039429.title: SpongeBob
3039429.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3039499.title: SpongeBob
3039499.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3039567.title: SpongeBob
3039567.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3039622.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3039622.description: Every year, Private is chosen as the cover animal for the zoo brochure. But this year the photographer discovers the adorable Mort. / A puffin rival from Skipper's past shows up. Skipper doesn't trust his claims that he's here to bury the hatchet.

3039957.title: De avonturen van Kid Danger
3039957.description: When the Wahoo Punch Bro is running amok through Swellview, Captain Man & Kid Danger must find a way to stop him. // When Mitch Bilsky mocks Henry's kiddie motor scooter, Ray sets up race between Henry & Mitch to prove whose transportation is faster.

3040020.title: De Casagrandes
3040020.description: Ronnie Anne thinks her grandparent's marriage is in trouble after watching a relationship talk show. // Ronnie Anne learns the art of baile folklorico - and that her Tia Frida is one intense instructor!

3040108.title: Huize Herrie
3040108.description: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

3040395.title: Huize Herrie
3040395.description: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears.

3040451.title: Hier is Pony
3040451.description: When a noisy neighbor drives Annie to the brink, she and Pony have to find a way to quiet her down. // When Annie gets sick and can't ride the new rollercoaster, Pony tries everything to make her better.

3040506.title: Hier is Pony
3040506.description: Everyone is dreading the Valentine's school dance, so Annie and Pony try to get it cancelled. // Annie tries to help Dad work through his stage fright by encouraging him to be more like Pony.

3040575.title: SpongeBob
3040575.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3040902.title: Dorg van Dango
3040902.description: It's Taco Tuesday and there's a taco shell shortage in town. Patronella casts a spell that ends up going wrong. / A high-tech rival store opens up across from the 98 Cent Store, Dorg and the gang use their powers to keep his mom in business!

3040990.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3040990.description: Michelangelo befriends an unstable mutant alligator who possesses a strange piece of Kraang technology, but the other Turtles aren't sure whether Leatherhead is a friend or a foe.

3041024.title: Breadwinners
3041024.description: SwaySway and Buhdeuce head deep into the bread mines to introduce their number one customer to the Bread Maker! // After breaking each other's favorite possessions, they get into a feud and might just part ways FOREVER!

3041099.title: SpongeBob
3041099.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3085830.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3085830.description: While Dave is working on an important new song, the Chipmunks are upstairs making a mess of their bedroom. Dave orders them to clean their room. But in the process, they accidentally ruin Dave's new song. Can they fix it in time for the big performance?

3041427.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3041427.description: When Dave refuses to let Alvin get a dangerous toy sports car, Alvin secretly convinces Simon to build him an exact replica of the car. Will Alvin be able to keep this secret from Dave? Or will it turn out that the toy car is TOO FAST - TOO FURIOUS?!

3041464.title: The Loud House
3041464.description: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake! // Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

3041522.title: The Loud House
3041522.description: Lynn denkt dat Lincoln ongeluk brengt en weet de hele familie daarvan te overtuigen. // Juf Johnson gaat met de klas kikkers ontleden. Lana probeert samen met Lincoln de kikkers te redden van die gruweldaad.

3041620.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3041620.description: Poof is trying to get the hang of shape shifting - unfortunately he takes after Cosmo! // Timmy's been running Cosmo and Wanda ragged so Jorgen takes him to 'Wishing Well'.

3041930.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3041930.description: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car! // Wanda worries that Poof doesn't have interaction with other fairy babies, so Timmy turns the adult fairies into babies, so Poof can play with.

3042019.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042019.description: Usagi leads the Turtles through a haunted forest where they encounter mischievous and dangerous spirits.

3042112.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3042112.description: As they reach their destination, Usagi and the Turtles must help Kintaro fulfill his destiny.

3042432.title: SpongeBob
3042432.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3042474.title: SpongeBob
3042474.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3042544.title: Ollie's Pack
3042544.description: Ollie tracks down a vindictive monster who is vandalizing Portshill and trying to pin it on him. // Ollie's feelings about Turner unleashes a shadow monster that gets its power from negativity.

3042615.title: The Loud House
3042615.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

3042926.title: De Casagrandes
3042926.description: When they find a treasure map, the Casagrandes go on a wild search for Pancho Villa's gold. // Frida and Carlos go on a fancy plane ride, but Carl and CJ try to sneak on for an adventure of their own.

3042977.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3042977.description: Master Yao returns to the Jade Palace and announces that he's offering the Valley of Peace a one-day "Wonder and Wisdom Exchange." Anyone who brings him a new wonder will be allowed to ask him a single question.

3043038.title: Kung Fu Panda - Legends of Awesomeness
3043038.description: Po saves a girl from some bandits, only to learn that she's engaged to be married to the Dragon Warrior
